name: mise
description: A tool for managing runtime versions

subcommands.name: activate
subcommands.description: Initializes mise in the current shell session

subcommands.name: alias
subcommands.description: Manage aliases

subcommands.name: backends
subcommands.description: Manage backends

subcommands.name: bin-paths
subcommands.description: List all the active runtime bin paths

subcommands.name: cache
subcommands.description: Manage the mise cache

subcommands.name: completion
subcommands.description: Generate shell completions

subcommands.name: config
subcommands.description: [experimental] Manage config files

subcommands.name: current
subcommands.description: Shows current active and installed runtime versions

subcommands.name: deactivate
subcommands.description: Disable mise for current shell session

subcommands.name: direnv
subcommands.description: Output direnv function to use mise inside direnv

subcommands.name: doctor
subcommands.description: Check mise installation for possible problems

subcommands.name: env
subcommands.description: Exports env vars to activate mise a single time

subcommands.name: exec
subcommands.description: Execute a command with tool(s) set

subcommands.name: implode
subcommands.description: Removes mise CLI and all related data

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install a tool version

subcommands.name: latest
subcommands.description: Gets the latest available version for a plugin

subcommands.name: link
subcommands.description: Symlinks a tool version into mise

subcommands.name: ls
subcommands.description: List installed and active tool versions

subcommands.name: ls-remote
subcommands.description: List runtime versions available for install

subcommands.name: outdated
subcommands.description: Shows outdated tool versions

subcommands.name: plugins
subcommands.description: Manage plugins

subcommands.name: prune
subcommands.description: Delete unused versions of tools

subcommands.name: reshim
subcommands.description: Rebuilds the shim farm

subcommands.name: run
subcommands.description: [experimental] Run tasks

subcommands.name: self-update
subcommands.description: Updates mise itself

subcommands.name: set
subcommands.description: Manage environment variables

subcommands.name: settings
subcommands.description: Manage settings

subcommands.name: shell
subcommands.description: Sets a tool version for the current session

subcommands.name: sync
subcommands.description: Add tool versions from external tools to mise

subcommands.name: tasks
subcommands.description: [experimental] Manage tasks

subcommands.name: trust
subcommands.description: Marks a config file as trusted

subcommands.name: uninstall
subcommands.description: Removes runtime versions

subcommands.name: unset
subcommands.description: Remove environment variable(s) from the config file

subcommands.name: upgrade
subcommands.description: Upgrades outdated tool versions

subcommands.name: usage
subcommands.description: Generate a usage CLI spec

subcommands.name: use
subcommands.description: Install tool version and add it to config

subcommands.name: version
subcommands.description: Show mise version

subcommands.name: watch
subcommands.description: [experimental] Run tasks watching for changes

subcommands.name: where
subcommands.description: Display the installation path for a runtime

subcommands.name: which
subcommands.description: Shows the path that a bin name points to

subcommands.name: help
subcommands.description: Print this message or the help of the given subcommand(s)

name: -y
--yes
options.description: Answer yes to all confirmation prompts
